title: Adaface Software Engineering Quiz
text:
# Adaface Software Engineering Quiz

This Adaface conversational quiz is multiple choice, with hints and answers. It only has questions on the fundamentals of programming, algorithms and system design.

## Traditional tests are boring and focus on irrelevant, theoretical questions.

 

Which of the following return absolute value of a variable?

 abs() 
 absolute() 
 absol() 
 None of the above 

## Conversational assessments are engaging and focus on on-the-job skills.

Select an option to chat with Ada

logo

40 min tests. 
No trick questions. 
Accurate shortlisting.

deepti@adaface.com
